---
applyTo: "**/*"
description: "WordReel project overview and quick reference for AI agents"
---

# WordReel - AI Agent Instructions

> **TikTok-style English learning app** with karaoke subtitles, AI quizzes, and personalized recommendations.

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Frontend | Astro 4.x + React 18 + TailwindCSS |
| Backend | FastAPI (Python 3.11+) |
| Database | Supabase PostgreSQL + pgvector |
| Cache | Redis |
| Task Queue | Celery |
| AI | OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, AssemblyAI |
| Video | HLS/DASH streaming via CDN |

---

## Quick Commands

```bash
# Start backend
cd backend && docker compose up -d

# Start frontend
cd web && nvm use 24 && npm run dev

# Check logs
docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml logs -f api

# Run tests (REQUIRED before completing features)
cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v

# Crawl a video
curl -X POST "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/crawl" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"source_url": "https://www.tiktok.com/@user/video/123"}'
```

---

## Key API Endpoints

| Endpoint | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `POST /recommendations/session/init` | Create/restore session |
| `POST /recommendations/track` | Track watch events |
| `GET /recommendations/feed` | Get personalized feed |
| `GET /posts/feed` | Get general feed |
| `GET /quizzes/post/{id}` | Get quiz for video |
| `POST /admin/crawl` | Trigger video crawl |

---

## Critical Patterns

### 1. React Hooks Order (Frontend)
```typescript
// ✅ CORRECT: All hooks before conditionals
const Component = () => {
    const [state, setState] = useState();
    if (!visible) return null;  // After hooks
    return <div/>;
};
```

### 2. Subtitles Data Transformation (Backend)
```python
# ALWAYS use transform_post_data() before returning posts
post_data = transform_post_data(post_data)
posts.append(PostResponse(**post_data))
```

### 3. Session Header (API calls)
```typescript
headers: { 'X-Session-Id': sessionId }
```

### 4. Video Player Cleanup
```typescript
useEffect(() => {
    if (isActive) {
        const timeout = setTimeout(() => video.play(), 50);
        return () => {
            clearTimeout(timeout);
            video.pause();
            video.currentTime = 0;
        };
    }
}, [isActive]);
```

---

## File Locations

| What | Where |
|------|-------|
| API routes | `backend/api/routes/` |
| Services | `backend/services/` |
| Pydantic schemas | `backend/models/schemas.py` |
| Video player | `web/src/components/video/VideoPlayer.tsx` |
| API client | `web/src/lib/api.ts` |

---

## Common Errors & Fixes

| Error | Cause | Fix |
|-------|-------|-----|
| `Rendered fewer hooks` | Hooks after conditional | Move all hooks to top |
| `subtitles.0.subtitleId required` | Missing transform | Add `transform_post_data()` |
| Video not auto-playing | Autoplay blocked | Mute first, then play |
| Audio overlap | Previous not paused | Use cleanup in useEffect |

## Docker Services

| Service | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `redis` | Session storage + Celery broker |
| `api` | FastAPI server (port 8000) |
| `celery_worker` | Video processing tasks |
| `celery_beat` | Scheduled tasks |
| `recommendation_worker` | Redis→DB sync |

## Environment Variables

### Backend (`backend/.env`)
```bash
SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY, SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET
OPENAI_API_KEY, ASSEMBLYAI_API_KEY
REDIS_HOST, TUS_SERVER_URL, CDN_BASE_URL
```

### Frontend (`web/.env`)
```bash
PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, PUBLIC_API_URL
```

## Version: 1.1.0 (February 2026)

### Recent Updates
- Redis-based session management (all users)
- Watch tracking with prefetch system
- IntersectionObserver for video active detection
- All watched videos excluded from recommendations
